meaning: bits per second 比特/秒;bits per second,位/秒,每秒位数。
examples: A minimum 28,800 bps modem is probably the slowest you'll want to put up with.
Industrial margins improved to 17.1%, up 70 BPS from a year ago.
The current bid is now 324 bps higher than the final reading of 2012.
At the 10 year level the premium on Greek debt was 1, 556 bps over Germany.
